(base) houhaozheng@houhaozheng:/$ rlaunch --gpu=8 --memory=1600000 --cpu=128 \
--charged-group=llmit6_gpu --private-machine=yes \  
--mount=gpfs://gpfs1/houhaozheng:/mnt/shared-storage-user/houhaozheng \
--mount=gpfs://gpfs1/dllm-share:/mnt/shared-storage-user/dllm-share \
-- bash -c "sleep inf"
WARN[0000] failed to set endPoint, using default endPoint
WARN[0000] failed to set endPoint, using default endPoint
Launching interactive mode...
create podgroup queue-name=ailab-llmit6-llmit6-gpu group-name=ws-a03ac080ef9b19bd-task-c4bzh
INFO[0000] Prepare for worker creating...                worker=ailab-llmit6/ws-a03ac080ef9b19bd-worker-4x5dp

INFO[0010] Prepare for worker creating...                worker=ailab-llmit6/ws-a03ac080ef9b19bd-worker-4x5dp
INFO[0018] Prepare for worker creating...                worker=ailab-llmit6/ws-a03ac080ef9b19bd-worker-4x5dp
INFO[0025] Prepare for worker creating...                worker=ailab-llmit6/ws-a03ac080ef9b19bd-worker-4x5dp
INFO[0039] Prepare for worker creating...                worker=ailab-llmit6/ws-a03ac080ef9b19bd-worker-4x5dp
INFO[0045] Prepare for worker creating...                worker=ailab-llmit6/ws-a03ac080ef9b19bd-worker-4x5dp
INFO[0056] Unknown worker starting stage                 message="0/2059 nodes are unavailable: 1812 Insufficient cpu, 24 Insufficient nvidia.com/gpu, 47 node(s) didn't match Pod's node affinity/selector, 85 node(s) were unschedulable, 91 Insufficient memory." worker=ailab-llmit6/ws-a03ac080ef9b19bd-worker-4x5dp   这是起来了吗gpu

**没有起来**。从日志来看，你的任务还在等待调度，没有成功分配到资源。

关键信息在最后一行：
```
0/2059 nodes are unavailable: 
- 1812 Insufficient cpu
- 24 Insufficient nvidia.com/gpu  
- 47 node(s) didn't match Pod's node affinity/selector
- 85 node(s) were unschedulable
- 91 Insufficient memory
```

## 问题分析

你请求的资源配置非常高：
- **8 GPU**
- **128 CPU**
- **1600000 MB 内存**（约 1.56 TB）

集群中没有单个节点能满足这些要求。

## 建议解决方案

### 1. **降低资源请求**（推荐）
```bash
rlaunch --gpu=8 --memory=400000 --cpu=64 \
--charged-group=llmit6_gpu --private-machine=yes \
--mount=gpfs://gpfs1/houhaozheng:/mnt/shared-storage-user/houhaozheng \
--mount=gpfs://gpfs1/dllm-share:/mnt/shared-storage-user/dllm-share \
-- bash -c "sleep inf"
```

### 2. **检查集群可用资源**
```bash
# 查看当前排队状态
rlaunch --list

# 或者查看集群资源
kubectl get nodes
```

### 3. **分阶段调整**
先尝试最小配置看能否起来：
```bash
rlaunch --gpu=8 --memory=200000 --cpu=32 \
--charged-group=llmit6_gpu \
--mount=gpfs://gpfs1/houhaozheng:/mnt/shared-storage-user/houhaozheng \
-- bash -c "sleep inf"
```

### 4. **取消当前任务**
```bash
# 按 Ctrl+C 取消，或者
rlaunch --kill <job-id>
```

**建议**：除非确实需要，否则不要一次性请求这么多资源（特别是 1.6TB 内存），这会导致调度困难。
怎么查看我的环境装在了哪个路径
